ITEM 2.PROPERTIES
Our headquarters are located in [LOCATION], [LOCATION]. We also own and lease office and building space in the surrounding areas near our headquarters, which we believe is sufficient to accommodate anticipated future growth. In addition, we own and lease office/building space and research and development sites around the world, primarily in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], and [LOCATION]. We own and operate data centers in the [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], and [LOCATION]. We believe our existing facilities, both owned and leased, are in good condition and suitable for the conduct of our business.
ITEM 3.
